query:
-- Create a test driver user
INSERT INTO users (id, email, password, name, phone, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  'driver-test-001',
  'driver@test.com',
  'test123',
  'Test Driver',
  '+1234567890',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Create driver profile
INSERT INTO drivers (id, user_id, license_number, vehicle_type, vehicle_plate, rating, total_rides, is_online, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  'driver-001',
  'driver-test-001',
  'DL123456',
  'sedan',
  'ABC123',
  4.8,
  45,
  true,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
